calendar.matters:
Ntc And Motion To Compel Responses To Petitioner'S First Set Of Demand For Production
Off Calendar Jun-30-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

CALLIE GREEN, self-represented litigant and Claimant.

NO OTHER APPEARANCES. THE TENTATIVE RULING WAS ADOPTED. PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioner's First Set Of Demand For Production is granted. No opposition has been filed. Respondent is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit a form of order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.
